title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Adobe India

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Adobe India
jsonLd.description:
Adobe India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Frontend Developer for our Madurai operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Adobe India:
Adobe India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in JavaScript

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• Referral bonus program
• Flexible working hours
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Adobe India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
